## Description
Explain the changes you've made.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Testing/CI harness

## Checklist
- [ ] All new code compiles under .NET 8.
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes locally.
- [ ] No external network calls are made in unit tests.
- [ ] Documentation (if applicable) is updated.
- [ ] Debug provider is gated by `#if DEBUG` and cannot be enabled in Production.
- [ ] (Optional) Example e2e test runs against the Docker Compose test stack.
